collections.name: Featured
collections.description: Hand-picked, widely adopted relays with strong operational track record.

collections.name: Global Feeds
collections.description: General-purpose relays that accept events from any pubkey.

collections.name: Curated Communities
collections.description: Relays that focus on community-driven content and curation.

collections.name: Special Purpose
collections.description: Relays with unique filtering rules, display mechanisms, or event constraints.

collections.name: Automated Feeds
collections.description: Relays that primarily serve bot / algorithm / news feeds.

collections.name: Search & Index
collections.description: Relays exposing NIP-50 search or acting as indexers.

collections.name: Paid Relays
collections.description: Relays that require payment (admission, subscription, or per-event) to post.

collections.name: Web of Trust
collections.description: Relays filtering content by web-of-trust policies.

collections.name: Bridges & Aggregators
collections.description: Relays that bridge other networks (ActivityPub, RSS, etc.) or aggregate content.

collections.name: Regional — Americas
collections.description: Relays operated in North & South America.

collections.name: Regional — Asia / Pacific
collections.description: Relays operated in Asia and the Pacific.

collections.name: Tor / Onion
collections.description: Relays reachable via Tor hidden services (.onion).
